stories.headline: Gazan mother reunited with evacuated daughter after two years
stories.description: Gaza mom reunites with daughter evacuated during heavy fighting two years ago.

stories.headline: Sudan war ‘being fought on women’s bodies’: Survivors detail sexual assault
stories.description: In a new report, Doctors Without Borders says sexual violence is the ‘defining feature’ of the conflict in Sudan.

stories.headline: Hundreds of my abusers are still out there, says victim as grooming inquiry launched
stories.description: There needs to be accountability for the failings that led to this mass exploitation of children in UK, says survivor.

stories.headline: Palestine weekly wrap: Holy sites remain closed as deadly violence spreads
stories.description: Settler attacks, East Jerusalem evictions, shuttering of sacred sites, as Israeli authorities assert control.

stories.headline: Iran war wipes $120bn off Dubai, Abu Dhabi stock markets
stories.description: The UAE’s financial markets have been some of the hardest hit by the fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran.
